pass_context.rf12_definition: RF-12 flags: evidence that a party is crafting messages for a legal audience rather than genuine communication. Key mechanisms: bait-and-switch sequences (provoke → pivot to reasonable → capture reaction); performative reasonableness (sounds reasonable but is crafted for exhibits); sudden formality inconsistent with established baseline; 'for the record' documentation language; timing correlation with legal events; creating misleading paper trails.
pass_context.methodology: RF-12 requires RF-12-SUPPLEMENT.md methodology: (1) build tone profiles for both parties across Phase A baseline before flagging; (2) detect tone-shift magnitude + duration; (3) identify bait-and-switch sequences (bait → pivot → capture → optional escalation blame); (4) score performative reasonableness (PRS 0-3). B-001 is PRIMARILY a baseline-building batch.

cross_rf_foundation.full_tier1_context_available: All 10 Tier 1 passes complete — maximum cross-RF context for tone-shift vs. genuine-improvement disambiguation. Critical: Eli's Phase B/C AI-guided communication (ChatGPT from EP-1078 May 2025) IS genuine improvement, not strategic communication. Any tone improvement from Eli in Phase B/C should be attributed to genuine change, not RF-12 flagging.
cross_rf_foundation.rf04_bait_context: RF-04 complete (93 flags). DARVO mechanism inherently contains bait-and-switch elements: Melissa provokes with DARVO, then pivots to victim positioning. Key RF-04 compounds are also RF-12 candidates: COMP-RF04-029 (Feb 2026 amplification: raised voice → verbal abuse → traumatized) is a strategic narrative construction sequence.
cross_rf_foundation.rf09_context: RF-09 XREF-001 (ROW-9964 'There's no threats' vs. ROW-9957 documented threat) — strategic denial with documentation awareness. This is a Level A cross-reference pair and also a strong RF-12 signal (performative denial for legal audience).
cross_rf_foundation.rf13_phase_bc: RF-13 ADD-002: Eli's AI-guided communication from EP-1078 May 2025. Melissa escalated regardless — de-escalation resistance. Melissa's communication pattern did NOT genuinely improve in response. Any 'reasonable' Melissa messages in Phase B/C occurring around hostility should be assessed for strategic bait-and-switch framing.
known_bait_triggers: Abby-content: any mention of Abby or the uncle/niece dynamic triggers strong reactions from Melissa
Holiday windows: Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas, Valentine's, New Year's — multi-year confirmed escalation triggers
Logistics/scheduling requests: RF-03 candidates also serve as bait topics
Legal/contempt references: Melissa's paper-tiger legal threats (RF-05) may be strategic documentation

calibration_episode.batch_tone: Cooperative baseline Jan-Oct 2022. PRE-AWARENESS period for both parties — neither is expected to be crafting messages strategically. B-001 is the most important batch for RF-12: establishes Phase A communication baseline for both directions. Tone profiles are the primary deliverable from this batch.
calibration_episode.reason_not_flagged: Jan-Oct 2022 cooperative baseline — pre-awareness, pre-legal-strategy period. No strategic communication expected. Triage hot periods (2025-02, 2025-08) are in Phase B — consistent with strategic communication emerging after legal involvement increases. Confirming zero RF-12 primary flags for B-001. Primary output: Phase A tone profile initialization for both parties.

melissa_phase_a_initial.note: Phase A baseline = B-001 through B-003 minimum. RF-04 record establishes volatile/DARVO baseline as Phase A norm. Strategic communication would be a DEPARTURE from this volatile baseline.

eli_phase_a_initial.note: Phase A Eli: de-escalator role confirmed by RF-13. Communication measured but not formal. Phase B/C shift (May 2025) is genuine — AI-guided.

batch_summary.note: Jan-Oct 2022 calibration batch. Zero RF-12 primary flags. Phase A baseline establishment in progress — tone profiles to be built across B-001 through B-003. Strategic communication expected to emerge in Phase B (B-025+, 2025 area) based on triage hot periods and legal timeline context (attorney engagement confirmed Sep 2025 per RF-05 S-021). Arc ARC-RF12-001 and ARC-RF12-002 initialized at CANDIDATE.
